user.title: Set up thermostat scheduling
user.description: Choose the climate entities Air Scheduler should manage.

data.apply_on_start: Apply the current scheduled state when Home Assistant starts

menu_option_descriptions.thermostats: Choose which climate entities Air Scheduler manages.
menu_option_descriptions.state_settings: Define Home, Away, and Sleep settings for each thermostat.
menu_option_descriptions.schedule_times: Add or remove times when a state is applied.

data.apply_on_start: Apply the current scheduled state when Home Assistant starts

state_settings.title: State settings
state_settings.description: Choose a state and thermostat to edit.

data_description.temperature: Use for heat-only, cool-only, or single-setpoint thermostats.
data_description.preset_mode: Leave blank unless your thermostat supports named presets.
data_description.fan_mode: Leave blank unless your thermostat supports fan modes.

menu_option_descriptions.add_schedule: Choose a state, time, days, and thermostats.

data_description.days: Leave empty to run every day.

error.no_thermostats: Add at least one thermostat first.
error.no_schedules: There are no schedules to remove.
